headline: Brookfield Stake Reshapes Duke Energy Florida Growth And Investor Outlook
summary: Duke Energy (NYSE:DUK) has completed a minority investment transaction involving Duke Energy Florida. Brookfield has acquired a 9.2% stake in Duke Energy Florida as part of this transaction. The deal represents the first stage of a broader partnership intended to support infrastructure growth in Florida. Duke Energy, through its regulated utility operations, supplies electricity to customers in several U.S. regions, including Florida. The Brookfield investment in Duke Energy Florida...

headline: Wolfspeed Introduces Industry's First Commercially Available 10,000 V Silicon Carbide Power MOSFET
summary: DURHAM, N.C., March 05, 2026--Wolfspeed, Inc., a global leader in silicon carbide (SiC) technology, today announced the industry's first commercially available 10 kV SiC power MOSFET. This milestone marks a defining moment in the industry — unlocking architectural freedom, delivering unprecedented system durability, and advancing access to reliable and sustainable power for the world's most demanding applications. headline: Jeff Lyash appointed to Aecon’s Board of Directors
summary: TORONTO, March 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Aecon Group Inc. (TSX: ARE) (“Aecon”) is pleased to announce the appointment of Jeff Lyash to Aecon’s Board of Directors, effective immediately. Mr. Lyash will stand for election as a Director at the next Annual General Meeting of the Corporation on June 1, 2026. “We are pleased to welcome Mr. Lyash to our Board of Directors.
